summary: Iteration 5 testing complete: PO_GENERATED stage, HintBanner component, generate_po action, and complete B2B flow all working correctly. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed (100%), 13/13 shell tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/reset to reset database. DEAL_WON RFQ (Ready-Mix Concrete, buyer GLID 3, seller GLID 3.1) tested for PO generation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features tested and verified: 1) PO_GENERATED stage added after DEAL_WON in workflow - backend PROBABILITY_MAP, FULFILLMENT_PROGRESS, POST_DEAL_STAGES all updated. 2) generate_po action successfully transitions RFQ from DEAL_WON to PO_GENERATED. 3) HintBanner component shows role-specific hints for all 18 stages including PO_GENERATED - buyer sees 'Waiting for seller to send proforma invoice', seller sees 'PO received from buyer. Send your proforma invoice...' with 💡 Suggested Action. 4) Admin portal shows PO_GENERATED in stage distribution pie chart. 5) Complete B2B flow validated: RFQ_SENT → QUOTE_RECEIVED → NEGOTIATION → DEAL_WON → PO_GENERATED → PROFORMA_SENT → PAYMENT_PENDING → PAYMENT_RECEIVED → IN_TRANSIT → DELIVERED → CLOSED. 6) Flexible RFQ APIs (broadcast, bulk) still functional. 7) All 13 shell tests and 8 pytest tests pass.

backend_apis: POST /api/rfqs/{id}/actions with action='generate_po' transitions to PO_GENERATED ✅
GET /api/admin/rfqs lists RFQs including PO_GENERATED stage ✅
Complete B2B lifecycle: DEAL_WON → PO_GENERATED → ... → CLOSED ✅
frontend_features: Buyer Dashboard shows 'PO Generated' stage badge ✅
Stage Flow in RFQ Workspace includes PO Generated step ✅
HintBanner shows buyer-specific hint at PO_GENERATED stage ✅
HintBanner shows seller-specific hint with 'Send Proforma' action at PO_GENERATED stage ✅
Fulfillment Progress bar shows 10% at PO_GENERATED stage ✅
Post-Deal Tabs (Invoice, Payments, Shipments, Delivery, Review) visible ✅
Admin Portal Stage Distribution pie chart shows PO_GENERATED ✅
Admin Portal login works with provided credentials ✅
Send Proforma Invoice form appears for seller at PO_GENERATED stage ✅
Generate Purchase Order button available for buyer at DEAL_WON stage (InlineActionBar) ✅

known_working_flows: Complete B2B: RFQ_SENT → QUOTE_RECEIVED → NEGOTIATION → DEAL_WON → PO_GENERATED → PROFORMA_SENT → PAYMENT_PENDING → PAYMENT_RECEIVED → IN_TRANSIT → DELIVERED → CLOSED ✅
HintBanner role-based hints for all 18 stages ✅
Admin Portal analytics with PO_GENERATED stage ✅
Flexible RFQ broadcast and bulk APIs ✅
b2b_procurement_stages_validated: RFQ_SENT - RFQ created and sent to seller
SELLER_VERIFIED - Seller verified via video KYC
PO_GENERATED - Purchase Order created by buyer
PROFORMA_SENT - Proforma invoice sent by seller
